steps.title: Read x = 0
steps.content: The $y$-intercept occurs where $x=0$. The table includes that row, and the corresponding $y$-value is $15$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content:
The $y$-coordinate of the $y$-intercept is $15$.

This is the defining feature of a y-intercept: it is the point where the graph crosses the y-axis, so the x-coordinate must be 0.
